title: Why These 7 Stocks Are the Best Ways to Play Retail Right Now

title: Ulta Beauty: Beautiful Business Attractively Priced
text: Ulta Beauty has steadily grown its revenue and market share by successfully attracting beauty enthusiasts. The possibilities of recession are a danger, but Ulta has proved its resilience. I rate the stock a buy, as it is attractively priced and investors should get double digits returns.

title: Ulta Beauty: Buy This Long-Term Winner During Theft Worries
text: Ulta Beauty is a long-term winner that is currently down due to worries about theft at its retail locations. The company has clear competitive advantages. Based on an inverse DCF model, shares look attractively priced.

title: Why Ulta Beauty Stock Jumped 15% in June
text: Ulta beauty has a keen sense of its customers and generates high sales growth from loyal shoppers. It typically delivers robust profitability from this high-margin industry.

title: Better Buy: Costco vs. Ulta Beauty
text: Ulta is more profitable, but Costco is less risky. Both companies demonstrate high customer loyalty today.
